title: Implement chaos rules framework
description: Create python/src/lichen/sim/chaos.py. ChaosRule ABC with matches(tx, rx_node) -> bool and apply(tx) -> Transmission | None. Concrete rules: DropRule(node_id, direction='tx|rx|both', count), PartitionRule(groups: list[set[str]]), DegradeRule(node_id, rssi_penalty_db), JammerRule(x, y, z, radius_m, power_dbm), LatencyRule(node_id, added_us). ChaosEngine class: add_rule(rule), remove_rule(rule_id), clear(), apply_all(tx, rx_node) -> Transmission | None. Unit tests for each rule type.
close_reason: Wave 4 complete. 348 tests pass, ruff clean.
